title: Finance Analyst
description: Remote 1099 finance analyst supporting financial modeling, reporting, and analysis for a growing investment and operations company. Flexible hours, work independently.
requirements: Financial modeling, Excel, data analysis, FP&A or investment background preferred. Self-starter, detail-oriented.
screening_questions: Walk me through your most relevant finance experience.
Have you worked in a 1099 contractor capacity before?
What financial modeling or analysis tools do you use regularly?
What compensation range are you targeting?
What is your availability to start?
